basicDetails.schemeName: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Fish Seed Stocking - Gujarat

nodalDepartmentName.label: Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
The scheme "Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries" with the component of "Fish seed Stocking", introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to Scheduled Caste (SC) people involved in inland fisheries activities. Through this scheme, 100% assistance for the cost of fish seed and transportation is provided to Scheduled Caste fish farmers and fishermen to boost fish farming and fishing activities in freshwater bodies. The scheme is implemented for the benefit of Scheduled Caste fishermen in the state. The scheme is implemented by the Commissioner of Fisheries, Government of Gujarat.
> **Objectives:** - To increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to scheduled caste (SC) people involved in inland fisheries activities. - To boost fish farming or fishing activities in freshwater bodies by scheduled caste (SC) fish farmers and fishermen. - Fishing in reservoirs, aquaculture in ponds, and catch from rivers increase fish production and boost inland fisheries through scheduled caste (SC) fish farmers and fishermen. - The main objective is to provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Caste fishermen in the state and increase fish production.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - 100% assistance is given to Scheduled Castes for the cost of fish seed and the total cost, including transportation. > **Note:** Minimum Time Limit (in Years) for Reclaiming Benefits: 1 Year
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to Schedule Caste (SC) people involved in inland fisheries activities.

children.text: The scheme "Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries" with the component of "Fish seed Stocking", introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to Scheduled Caste (SC) people involved in inland fisheries activities. Through this scheme, 100% assistance for the cost of fish seed and transportation is provided to Scheduled Caste fish farmers and fishermen to boost fish farming and fishing activities in freshwater bodies. The scheme is implemented for the benefit of Scheduled Caste fishermen in the state. The scheme is implemented by the Commissioner of Fisheries, Government of Gujarat.
Objectives:
To increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to scheduled caste (SC) people involved in inland fisheries activities.
To boost fish farming or fishing activities in freshwater bodies by scheduled caste (SC) fish farmers and fishermen.
Fishing in reservoirs, aquaculture in ponds, and catch from rivers increase fish production and boost inland fisheries through scheduled caste (SC) fish farmers and fishermen.
The main objective is to provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Caste fishermen in the state and increase fish production.
100% assistance is given to Scheduled Castes for the cost of fish seed and the total cost, including transportation.
Note:
Minimum Time Limit (in Years) for Reclaiming Benefits: 1 Year
Registration Process:
Step 1:
The applicant may visit and apply online at the
I-Khedut Portal
Step 2:
Click on 'Login' from the top right-hand side, then click on "Beneficiary Registration" and select any one from the 'Farmer' or 'Institutional' or 'Except For the Farmer' as the Beneficiary Type.
Step 3:

Enter the 'Company Name' and Address if you have selected 'Institutional' or 'Except For the Farmer' as the Beneficiary Type. And for all select the District, Taluka, and Village, choose 'what type of account holder you are?', enter your Account Number and Name, solve the Captcha, and click 'Save and Next'.
Step 4:
Enter your Mobile Number and E-mail address, click 'Send OTP', enter the received OTP, create and confirm a Password, solve the Captcha, and click 'Submit'.
Login Process:
Step 1:
The applicant may visit and apply online at the
I-Khedut Portal
Step 2:
Click on 'Login' from the top right-hand side of the homepage. On the home page, click on ‘Schemes’ and then click on ‘Agricultural Schemes’.
Step 3:
Now select the scheme, click on the ‘Apply’ button, and an application page will open.
Step 4:
Click on the "Apply New" button and submit a new application.
Step 5:
Click on the "Update Application" button to add corrections to the application.
Step 6:
Once the application is done, confirm it.
Step 7:
Take a printout of the confirmed application.
Contact Us:
Click here

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Registration Process:** **Step 1:** The applicant may visit and apply online at the [I-Khedut Portal](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/). **Step 2:** Click on 'Login' from the top right-hand side, then click on "Beneficiary Registration" and select any one from the 'Farmer' or 'Institutional' or 'Except For the Farmer' as the Beneficiary Type. **Step 3:** Enter the 'Company Name' and Address if you have selected 'Institutional' or 'Except For the Farmer' as the Beneficiary Type. And for all select the District, Taluka, and Village, choose 'what type of account holder you are?', enter your Account Number and Name, solve the Captcha, and click 'Save and Next'. **Step 4:** Enter your Mobile Number and E-mail address, click 'Send OTP', enter the received OTP, create and confirm a Password, solve the Captcha, and click 'Submit'.
> **Login Process:** **Step 1:** The applicant may visit and apply online at the [I-Khedut Portal](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/). **Step 2:** Click on 'Login' from the top right-hand side of the homepage. On the home page, click on ‘Schemes’ and then click on ‘Agricultural Schemes’. **Step 3:** Now select the scheme, click on the ‘Apply’ button, and an application page will open. **Step 4:** Click on the "Apply New" button and submit a new application. **Step 5:** Click on the "Update Application" button to add corrections to the application. **Step 6:** Once the application is done, confirm it. **Step 7:** Take a printout of the confirmed application.
> **Contact Us:** [**Click here**](https://ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in/Public/frm_Public_Contacts.aspx)**.**

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) community. 1. The applicant should be above 18 years of age. 1. The applicant should be involved in inland fisheries activities. 1. The applicant can be an individual, a society, a self-help group, an association, a reservoir monopoly, or a private unit. 1. The applicant must have a bank account in their own name. 1. The applicant must have an Aadhar Card/Voter ID/Ration Card/Passport as proof of identity.
> **Preference/Reservation:** The scheme specifically benefits Scheduled Caste fishermen under the inland fisheries scheme.

The applicant can be an individual, a society, a self-help group, an association, a reservoir monopoly, or a private unit.
The applicant must have a bank account in their own name.
The applicant must have an Aadhar Card/Voter ID/Ration Card/Passport as proof of identity.
Preference/Reservation:
The scheme specifically benefits Scheduled Caste fishermen under the inland fisheries scheme.
